{{Quote|Starship ''Candaserri'', Republic troopship, ''Acclamator''-class. Seven hundred fifty-two meters long. Crew seven hundred, military and support personnel fifteen thousand five hundred.|[[CT-4/619]], on the ''Candaserri''|<ref name="Boba Fett: Crossfire">''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Candaserri''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
===The Clone Wars===
In the early stages of the conflict, the ''Candaserri'' was used as a temporary refuge for orphans separated from their [[Parent/Legends|parents]]. It was one of the many [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] present at the [[Conquest of Raxus Prime]]. A [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Glynn-Beti]] rescued a young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and brought him to the ship. Boba, having boarded the ship under the guise of an orphan named Teff, befriended the [[Excargan]] [[Garr]] and explored the ship with him for much of their stay. The ''Candaserri'' arrived on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] a short while later to reunite the orphans with their families. At that time, it was commanded by Glynn-Beti and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Ulu Ulix]], who oversaw the [[Orphan Hall]].

===Later history===
The ''Candaserri'' survived to see use in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
